---
title: "Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words"
---

# Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words

Range: `1291-1350`.

## Completion

| Status   | Count |
| -------- | ----- |
| authored | 60    |

Use the summary table for scanning. Each row links to the detailed anchored entry below.

| Sigil | Term                                 | Completion | Summary                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ----- | ------------------------------------ | ---------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1291  | [accessibility](#rune-1291)          | authored   | Make the system usable by people with varied bodies, senses, and tools.                                                                                                                                                           |
| 1292  | [adaptive layout](#rune-1292)        | authored   | `adaptive layout` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the adaptive layout obligation named before work proceeds.               |
| 1293  | [affordance](#rune-1293)             | authored   | A cue that suggests what action is possible here.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 1294  | [animation](#rune-1294)              | authored   | `animation` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the animation obligation named before work proceeds.                           |
| 1295  | [app shell](#rune-1295)              | authored   | `app shell` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the app shell obligation named before work proceeds.                           |
| 1296  | [breadcrumb](#rune-1296)             | authored   | `breadcrumb` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the breadcrumb obligation named before work proceeds.                         |
| 1297  | [call to action](#rune-1297)         | authored   | `call to action` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the call to action obligation named before work proceeds.                 |
| 1298  | [click target](#rune-1298)           | authored   | `click target` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the click target obligation named before work proceeds.                     |
| 1299  | [component {UX}](#rune-1299)         | authored   | `component` in its UX sense is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the component obligation named before work proceeds.           |
| 1300  | [confirmation](#rune-1300)           | authored   | `confirmation` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the confirmation obligation named before work proceeds.                     |
| 1301  | [copy](#rune-1301)                   | authored   | `copy` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the copy obligation named before work proceeds.                                     |
| 1302  | [dark mode](#rune-1302)              | authored   | `dark mode` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the dark mode obligation named before work proceeds.                           |
| 1303  | [discoverability](#rune-1303)        | authored   | How easily a user can find what the system can do.                                                                                                                                                                                |
| 1304  | [empty state](#rune-1304)            | authored   | `empty state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the empty state obligation named before work proceeds.                       |
| 1305  | [error state](#rune-1305)            | authored   | `error state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the error state obligation named before work proceeds.                       |
| 1306  | [feedback](#rune-1306)               | authored   | The system speaking back after the user acts.                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| 1307  | [focus state](#rune-1307)            | authored   | `focus state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the focus state obligation named before work proceeds.                       |
| 1308  | [form validation](#rune-1308)        | authored   | Validation at the form boundary so bad input is caught legibly.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 1309  | [gesture](#rune-1309)                | authored   | `gesture` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the gesture obligation named before work proceeds.                               |
| 1310  | [grid](#rune-1310)                   | authored   | `grid` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the grid obligation named before work proceeds.                                     |
| 1311  | [hierarchy {UX}](#rune-1311)         | authored   | `hierarchy` in its UX sense is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the hierarchy obligation named before work proceeds.           |
| 1312  | [hover state](#rune-1312)            | authored   | `hover state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the hover state obligation named before work proceeds.                       |
| 1313  | [hydration](#rune-1313)              | authored   | `hydration` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the hydration obligation named before work proceeds.                           |
| 1314  | [input field](#rune-1314)            | authored   | `input field` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the input field obligation named before work proceeds.                       |
| 1315  | [interaction](#rune-1315)            | authored   | `interaction` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the interaction obligation named before work proceeds.                       |
| 1316  | [internationalization](#rune-1316)   | authored   | `internationalization` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the internationalization obligation named before work proceeds.     |
| 1317  | [keyboard navigation](#rune-1317)    | authored   | Make the interface fully operable without a mouse.                                                                                                                                                                                |
| 1318  | [label {UX}](#rune-1318)             | authored   | `label` in its UX sense is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the label obligation named before work proceeds.                   |
| 1319  | [layout {UX}](#rune-1319)            | authored   | `layout` in its UX sense is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the layout obligation named before work proceeds.                 |
| 1320  | [localization](#rune-1320)           | authored   | `localization` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the localization obligation named before work proceeds.                     |
| 1321  | [menu](#rune-1321)                   | authored   | `menu` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the menu obligation named before work proceeds.                                     |
| 1322  | [microcopy](#rune-1322)              | authored   | `microcopy` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the microcopy obligation named before work proceeds.                           |
| 1323  | [modal](#rune-1323)                  | authored   | `modal` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the modal obligation named before work proceeds.                                   |
| 1324  | [navigation](#rune-1324)             | authored   | `navigation` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the navigation obligation named before work proceeds.                         |
| 1325  | [offline-first {UX}](#rune-1325)     | authored   | `offline-first` in its UX sense is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the offline-first obligation named before work proceeds.   |
| 1326  | [onboarding](#rune-1326)             | authored   | `onboarding` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the onboarding obligation named before work proceeds.                         |
| 1327  | [output view](#rune-1327)            | authored   | `output view` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the output view obligation named before work proceeds.                       |
| 1328  | [pagination control](#rune-1328)     | authored   | `pagination control` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the pagination control obligation named before work proceeds.         |
| 1329  | [panel](#rune-1329)                  | authored   | `panel` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the panel obligation named before work proceeds.                                   |
| 1330  | [placeholder](#rune-1330)            | authored   | `placeholder` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the placeholder obligation named before work proceeds.                       |
| 1331  | [progressive disclosure](#rune-1331) | authored   | Reveal complexity in stages rather than all at once.                                                                                                                                                                              |
| 1332  | [prompt surface {UX}](#rune-1332)    | authored   | `prompt surface` in its UX sense is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the prompt surface obligation named before work proceeds. |
| 1333  | [responsive design](#rune-1333)      | authored   | Layout that adapts gracefully to device or viewport size.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 1334  | [screen](#rune-1334)                 | authored   | `screen` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the screen obligation named before work proceeds.                                 |
| 1335  | [scroll state](#rune-1335)           | authored   | `scroll state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the scroll state obligation named before work proceeds.                     |
| 1336  | [search box](#rune-1336)             | authored   | `search box` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the search box obligation named before work proceeds.                         |
| 1337  | [selection](#rune-1337)              | authored   | `selection` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the selection obligation named before work proceeds.                           |
| 1338  | [skeleton state](#rune-1338)         | authored   | `skeleton state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the skeleton state obligation named before work proceeds.                 |
| 1339  | [state transition](#rune-1339)       | authored   | `state transition` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the state transition obligation named before work proceeds.             |
| 1340  | [stepper](#rune-1340)                | authored   | `stepper` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the stepper obligation named before work proceeds.                               |
| 1341  | [sync state](#rune-1341)             | authored   | `sync state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the sync state obligation named before work proceeds.                         |
| 1342  | [table view](#rune-1342)             | authored   | `table view` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the table view obligation named before work proceeds.                         |
| 1343  | [theme](#rune-1343)                  | authored   | `theme` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the theme obligation named before work proceeds.                                   |
| 1344  | [tooltip](#rune-1344)                | authored   | `tooltip` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the tooltip obligation named before work proceeds.                               |
| 1345  | [typography](#rune-1345)             | authored   | `typography` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the typography obligation named before work proceeds.                         |
| 1346  | [user flow](#rune-1346)              | authored   | The path a user walks through the product to finish a task.                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 1347  | [validation message](#rune-1347)     | authored   | `validation message` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the validation message obligation named before work proceeds.         |
| 1348  | [view model](#rune-1348)             | authored   | `view model` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the view model obligation named before work proceeds.                         |
| 1349  | [viewport](#rune-1349)               | authored   | `viewport` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the viewport obligation named before work proceeds.                             |
| 1350  | [visual hierarchy](#rune-1350)       | authored   | Arrange attention so the right thing is seen first.                                                                                                                                                                               |

## Entries

### [1291] accessibility {#rune-1291}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Make the system usable by people with varied bodies, senses, and tools.

**Shadow:** misusing `accessibility` at rune 1291 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

**Pocket gloss:** Make the system usable by people with varied bodies, senses, and tools.

### [1292] adaptive layout {#rune-1292}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `adaptive layout` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the adaptive layout obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `adaptive layout` at rune 1292 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1293] affordance {#rune-1293}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A cue that suggests what action is possible here.

**Shadow:** misusing `affordance` at rune 1293 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

**Pocket gloss:** A cue that suggests what action is possible here.

### [1294] animation {#rune-1294}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `animation` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the animation obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `animation` at rune 1294 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1295] app shell {#rune-1295}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `app shell` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the app shell obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `app shell` at rune 1295 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1296] breadcrumb {#rune-1296}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `breadcrumb` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the breadcrumb obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `breadcrumb` at rune 1296 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1297] call to action {#rune-1297}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `call to action` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the call to action obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `call to action` at rune 1297 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1298] click target {#rune-1298}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `click target` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the click target obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `click target` at rune 1298 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1299] component {UX} {#rune-1299}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `component` in its UX sense is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the component obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `component` at rune 1299 in the UX lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1300] confirmation {#rune-1300}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `confirmation` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the confirmation obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `confirmation` at rune 1300 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1301] copy {#rune-1301}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `copy` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the copy obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `copy` at rune 1301 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1302] dark mode {#rune-1302}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `dark mode` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the dark mode obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `dark mode` at rune 1302 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1303] discoverability {#rune-1303}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** How easily a user can find what the system can do.

**Shadow:** misusing `discoverability` at rune 1303 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

**Pocket gloss:** How easily a user can find what the system can do.

### [1304] empty state {#rune-1304}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `empty state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the empty state obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `empty state` at rune 1304 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1305] error state {#rune-1305}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `error state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the error state obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `error state` at rune 1305 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1306] feedback {#rune-1306}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The system speaking back after the user acts.

**Shadow:** misusing `feedback` at rune 1306 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

**Pocket gloss:** The system speaking back after the user acts.

### [1307] focus state {#rune-1307}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `focus state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the focus state obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `focus state` at rune 1307 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1308] form validation {#rune-1308}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Validation at the form boundary so bad input is caught legibly.

**Shadow:** misusing `form validation` at rune 1308 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

**Pocket gloss:** Validation at the form boundary so bad input is caught legibly.

### [1309] gesture {#rune-1309}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `gesture` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the gesture obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `gesture` at rune 1309 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1310] grid {#rune-1310}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `grid` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the grid obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `grid` at rune 1310 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1311] hierarchy {UX} {#rune-1311}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `hierarchy` in its UX sense is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the hierarchy obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `hierarchy` at rune 1311 in the UX lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1312] hover state {#rune-1312}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `hover state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the hover state obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `hover state` at rune 1312 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1313] hydration {#rune-1313}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `hydration` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the hydration obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `hydration` at rune 1313 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1314] input field {#rune-1314}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `input field` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the input field obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `input field` at rune 1314 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1315] interaction {#rune-1315}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `interaction` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the interaction obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `interaction` at rune 1315 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1316] internationalization {#rune-1316}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `internationalization` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the internationalization obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `internationalization` at rune 1316 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1317] keyboard navigation {#rune-1317}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Make the interface fully operable without a mouse.

**Shadow:** misusing `keyboard navigation` at rune 1317 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

**Pocket gloss:** Make the interface fully operable without a mouse.

### [1318] label {UX} {#rune-1318}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `label` in its UX sense is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the label obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `label` at rune 1318 in the UX lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1319] layout {UX} {#rune-1319}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `layout` in its UX sense is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the layout obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `layout` at rune 1319 in the UX lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1320] localization {#rune-1320}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `localization` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the localization obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `localization` at rune 1320 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1321] menu {#rune-1321}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `menu` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the menu obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `menu` at rune 1321 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1322] microcopy {#rune-1322}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `microcopy` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the microcopy obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `microcopy` at rune 1322 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1323] modal {#rune-1323}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `modal` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the modal obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `modal` at rune 1323 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1324] navigation {#rune-1324}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `navigation` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the navigation obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `navigation` at rune 1324 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1325] offline-first {UX} {#rune-1325}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `offline-first` in its UX sense is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the offline-first obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `offline-first` at rune 1325 in the UX lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1326] onboarding {#rune-1326}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `onboarding` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the onboarding obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `onboarding` at rune 1326 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1327] output view {#rune-1327}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `output view` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the output view obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `output view` at rune 1327 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1328] pagination control {#rune-1328}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `pagination control` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the pagination control obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `pagination control` at rune 1328 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1329] panel {#rune-1329}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `panel` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the panel obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `panel` at rune 1329 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1330] placeholder {#rune-1330}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `placeholder` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the placeholder obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `placeholder` at rune 1330 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1331] progressive disclosure {#rune-1331}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Reveal complexity in stages rather than all at once.

**Shadow:** misusing `progressive disclosure` at rune 1331 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

**Pocket gloss:** Reveal complexity in stages rather than all at once.

### [1332] prompt surface {UX} {#rune-1332}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `prompt surface` in its UX sense is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the prompt surface obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `prompt surface` at rune 1332 in the UX lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1333] responsive design {#rune-1333}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Layout that adapts gracefully to device or viewport size.

**Shadow:** misusing `responsive design` at rune 1333 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

**Pocket gloss:** Layout that adapts gracefully to device or viewport size.

### [1334] screen {#rune-1334}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `screen` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the screen obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `screen` at rune 1334 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1335] scroll state {#rune-1335}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `scroll state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the scroll state obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `scroll state` at rune 1335 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1336] search box {#rune-1336}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `search box` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the search box obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `search box` at rune 1336 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1337] selection {#rune-1337}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `selection` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the selection obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `selection` at rune 1337 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1338] skeleton state {#rune-1338}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `skeleton state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the skeleton state obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `skeleton state` at rune 1338 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1339] state transition {#rune-1339}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `state transition` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the state transition obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `state transition` at rune 1339 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1340] stepper {#rune-1340}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `stepper` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the stepper obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `stepper` at rune 1340 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1341] sync state {#rune-1341}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `sync state` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the sync state obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `sync state` at rune 1341 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1342] table view {#rune-1342}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `table view` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the table view obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `table view` at rune 1342 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1343] theme {#rune-1343}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `theme` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the theme obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `theme` at rune 1343 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1344] tooltip {#rune-1344}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `tooltip` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the tooltip obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `tooltip` at rune 1344 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1345] typography {#rune-1345}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `typography` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the typography obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `typography` at rune 1345 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1346] user flow {#rune-1346}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The path a user walks through the product to finish a task.

**Shadow:** misusing `user flow` at rune 1346 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

**Pocket gloss:** The path a user walks through the product to finish a task.

### [1347] validation message {#rune-1347}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `validation message` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the validation message obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `validation message` at rune 1347 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1348] view model {#rune-1348}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `view model` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the view model obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `view model` at rune 1348 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1349] viewport {#rune-1349}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `viewport` is a interface and user experience rune for shape human attention, action, recovery, and comprehension; use it when the artifact needs the viewport obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `viewport` at rune 1349 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

### [1350] visual hierarchy {#rune-1350}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Arrange attention so the right thing is seen first.

**Shadow:** misusing `visual hierarchy` at rune 1350 in the interface-ux lane can let the surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one; verify by requiring the caster to state the user task, feedback, affordance, and error recovery path.

**Pocket gloss:** Arrange attention so the right thing is seen first.
